creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
This is an update to py-feedgenerator so we can update www/pelican!

CommitLog:

www/py-feedgenerator: Update to 1.5, Use setuptools

- Update to 1.5
- Use setuptools instead of distutils
- Update pkg-plist
- Add RUN_DEPENDS on pytz and six
- Patch setup.py to fix test_suite and add zip_safe=False
- Trim Makefile header
- Whitespace alignment
- Update WWW location and change Tab->space in pkg-descr

QA:

portlint: OK - looks fine.
porttest: OK - 9-STABLE amd6)
unittest: OK - Ran 4 tests in 0.001s
testport: OK - poudriere - All versions & archs

Port maintainer (jlaffaye@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_7 (mode: update, diff: ports)
